title: Change Tab Tasks
description: Studio UI for **Change Tab Tasks**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Tasks**.
context: Studio UI for **Change Tab Tasks**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Tasks**.

rules.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
rules:
While this change tab is visible, the view MUST call `getChangeStatus(name, { ifModifiedSince })` using the last seen `updatedAt`. When the API returns `unchanged: true`, the view MUST skip heavy refetch. When `updatedAt` advances, the view MUST refetch task-capable artifact content when needed through the matching change read route. Polling MUST pause when the tab is hidden or the window lacks focus. After a successful Save, the view MUST refetch immediately.

Task-capable artifacts are not identified by a fixed filename. The view MUST resolve them from API metadata (`hasTasks`) and MUST render every tracked file belonging to task-capable artifacts, not just the first file.

The tasks summary shown for a change MUST use API-provided aggregate counters (`totalTasks`, `completedTasks`) that represent the sum across all task-capable artifacts in that change.

For **archived** changes, the tab MUST derive task-capable artifact presence from the archived snapshot detail (`getArchivedChange`) and MUST load each tracked body through the archived read-only artifact route instead of showing a blanket unavailable message.

When a rendered tasks file ends with `.md`, the body MUST be rendered as Markdown. Other file formats MAY be rendered as plain text. Each rendered file MUST show its filename in the section header.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).

rules.requirement: component SHALL avoid infinite render loops from unstable dependencies
rules: The Tasks tab component SHALL stabilize all array and object references passed as dependencies to downstream hooks (e.g. `useChangeArtifacts`). It MUST use `useMemo` for derived mappings and use static constants for default empty values to prevent continuous re-triggering of effect-based resource loading.

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Unchanged status skips tab refetch
then: tab does not refetch heavy views
AND spinner stops without data swap

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Advanced updatedAt refetches tab data
then: only this tab data sources reload
AND other tabs are unaffected

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Hidden tab pauses polling
given: change tab was visible then hidden
then: no tab-scoped status request is sent
AND cache is retained until visible again

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Tasks tab loads every task-capable file when visible
given: active (non-archived) change with one or more task-capable artifacts
then: UI loads every tracked file from artifacts marked hasTasks
AND displays aggregate completedTasks/totalTasks from getChangeStatus when present

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Markdown task files render as markdown with filename headers
given: a task-capable artifact file named tasks-plan.md
then: the filename appears in the rendered section header
AND the body is rendered as Markdown rather than plain preformatted text

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches task-capable artifacts when needed when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Archived change loads tasks from archived snapshot
then: UI loads every tracked task-capable body through the archived read-only artifact route when present
AND falls back to the missing-tasks message only when the archived snapshot has no task-capable artifact files

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected
then: @specd/ui does not import @specd/core
AND components call client:port-* hooks

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: calls go through SpecdDataPort
AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: lint or build fails
AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: consumers receive an error object
AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: UI shows the conflict message
AND editor buffer is not silently replaced

scenarios.requirement: component SHALL avoid infinite render loops from unstable dependencies
scenarios.name: Tasks tab passes stable references to hooks
then: tasksEntry and selectedTaskFiles maintain stable references
AND useChangeArtifacts does not cycle through infinite reloads
